case_title: JEAN PHILIPPE METEIGNER VS. HENRY HALLER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY METEIGNER, JEAN PHILIPPE AS TO DEFENDANT HALLER, HENRY DBA HALLER MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF METEIGNER, JEAN PHILIPPE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALLER, HENRY DBA HALLER MANAGEMENT $4,438.13 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,513.13, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR ANY PARTIAL REFUNDS PAID TO, AND ACCEPTED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (FEE FOR SERVICE:$59.50) SERVED APR-06-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT METEIGNER, JEAN PHILIPPE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NO REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HALLER, HENRY DBA HALLER MANAGEMENT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT METEIGNER, JEAN PHILIPPE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED MAR-15-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HALLER, HENRY DBA HALLER MANAGEMENT
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,481.56 FILED BY HALLER, HENRY DBA HALLER MANAGEMENT AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT METEIGNER, JEAN PHILIPPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NO REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.
